Hiring Team
openai
Re: Support Delivery Lead, Government

Dear Hiring Team at openai,

My background as an I am a direct match for the Support Delivery Lead, Government role at openai. My experience leading technical delivery for a government program and architecting automation that reduced manual effort by 92% aligns with OpenAI's need for a Support Delivery Lead who can build a team that resolves complex issues and operationalizes solutions at scale.

OpenAI’s Support Delivery Lead role calls for someone who can build and lead a team of technical experts, operationalize solutions at scale, and take an automation-first approach. At the Australian Taxation Office, I lead the Agile Kookaburras squad on the Payday Super program, and I architected a COBOL/mainframe test-automation harness that cut evidence effort by 92% across 200+ SIT/E2E scenarios, operationalizing a solution that eliminated manual bottlenecks for all eight squads. At ANZ, I directed a $5M+ program portfolio, leading 5+ cross-functional squads to deliver cloud-native modernizations and AI/ML solutions, including a real-time telemetry system that reduced P95 latency to under 200 ms for 10k+ concurrent devices. I also convened a cross-discipline war room that produced a binding automation recom...TRUNCATED

[{"id":"ce2f682aeba72f9e9b07ff083","userId":"cc29a76e324fbf19f438eb8be","title":"Senior Product Manager, Strategic Origination Platforms","company":"Plenti","location":"Sydney","remote":false,"salaryMin":null,"salaryMax":null,"currency":null,"description":"Who is Plenti? Plenti is a fintech lender, providing faster, fairer loans by leveraging its smart technology. Plenti is a dynamic and innovative business that is growing strongly. By continuing to deliver better customer experiences, Plenti is taking market share from incumbent players in the personal lending, renewable energy, and automotive finance markets. We are a fast moving and ambitious business that seeks to recruit smart and capable people, who can take ownership of their role to help the business thrive. With over 250 people based in Australia, Plenti is of a size where everyone can make a difference in their role and help us realise our very big ambitions as a team, as we go about building Australia’s best lender. Plenti is a founder led business that launched in 2014, listed on the ASX since 2020 with annual revenue of over $250 million and a loan portfolio of over $3 billion. About the role: As Senior Product Manager, you will own the Originations platform systems that power every customer and partner channel across the business. This is a platform-first role focused on building scalable, reusable capabilities that support Consumer, Commercial, Renewables, Direct, and Partnership channels. You will define and evolve the shared origination platform that underpins how new products are launched, partners are onboarded, and the business scales. Leading the strategy, roadmap, and delivery of Plenti's end-to-end origination ecosystem, you'll drive the development of customer-facing portals, internal operational tooling, and the core platform capabilities that enable seamless, efficient lending experiences across the organisation. This includes: Customer-facing platforms: Broker Portal, Borrower Portal and Investor Portal Internal and operational tooling: Broker Portal Manager, fee configuration systems, customer administration tools, and servicing calculators Core platform capabilities such as Open Banking and Identity Resolution as a reusable, consistent capability across all channels Across these areas, you will shape the long-term platform roadmap, drive architecture and scalability decisions with engineering, translate operational and regulatory requirements into product capabilities, and ensure the organisation builds once and reuses everywhere. Key responsibilities: Define and deliver a cohesive, cross-channel platform roadmap, balancing immediate business needs with long-term scalability Drive platform architecture decisions with engineering, including configuration models, onboarding approaches, and technical debt prioritisation Translate operational pain points into structured, prioritised product improvements that reduce friction and increase automation Partner with multiple ch...TRUNCATED
